scripts.sync-music: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});const tracks=[['Neon Lobby.mp3','lobby-neon.mp3'],['Neon Battle.mp3','battle-neon.mp3'],['Sanctuaire Lobby.mp3','lobby-sanctuaire.mp3'],['Sanctuaire Battle.mp3','battle-sanctuaire.mp3'],['Forge Lobby.mp3','lobby-forge.mp3'],['Forge Battle.mp3','battle-forge.mp3'],['Glacees Lobby.mp3','lobby-glacees.mp3'],['Glacees Battle.mp3','battle-glacees.mp3']];for(const [src,dst] of tracks){const s=p.resolve('..','assets/music',src);if(fs.existsSync(s))fs.copyFileSync(s,p.join('public',dst));else console.warn('music track not found at',s);}"
